Notice Of Motion And Motion For Discovery And Disclosure Of Police Officer Personnel Files (Pitchess Motion); Memorandum Of P/A In Support
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David H. Helbraun, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Thomas Joseph Barnes
Robert A. Bonta, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Thomas Barnes' Motion For Discovery And Disclosure Of Police Officer Personnel Files is granted as it seeks an in camera review of the personnel records of Officer Joshua T. Phillips for complaints of use of excessive force for the period February 23, 2002 forward. The court does not find good cause for a review of the personnel files of officers Royer, Territo, and Wood. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
